project: Masters of Mathematics Thesis Renovation: AbTweak
source_of_truth: Git history in sgwoods/mmath-renovation, with sgwoods/public and sgwoods/abtweak-experiments-ui as companion repos for the mirrored public surface and hosted remote-experiment UI.
working_clone_model: Use a normal non-iCloud active clone for day-to-day work. Use iCloud for intake, backup-oriented material, and convenience paths only.

current_track.label: Current Track
current_track.note: The historical restoration baseline is frozen at 1.0.0-rc.1 while portability, handoff clarity, and post-RC continuation discipline are hardened.

current_focus.label: Current Focus
current_focus.value: Portability hardening and disciplined post-RC continuation
current_focus.note: The repo should be safe to continue from a fresh non-iCloud clone without relying on hidden local setup, while the open Hanoi-4 lane remains clearly bounded.

updated.label: Updated
updated.note: Root status markers, bootstrap docs, and migration scripts are intended to stay synchronized.
